items.name: Oceana Helmet
items.description:
How to obtain this artifact

The word/concept “Valkyrie” comes from Norse mythology, where Valkyries were warrior maidens serving Odin who chose which warriors would die in battle and be taken to Valhalla. So the idea of a Valkyrie helmet (winged or ornate battle headgear) is public domain nobody, including Roblox, can own mythology.

items.name: UNIT 019 "Mark of Endurance" Ballistic Helmet
items.description:
A ballistic helmet taken from the body of a fallen corporate operative, refurbished, repurposed, and given a battle-hardened flair to distinguish it from its corporate origins. A testament to blood shed and faith held... for a tomorrow without tears.

Check out our other UGC items: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Darkzone%20Armory&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1

items.name: FLAK2 T-INH "Taurus" Helmet (Black)
items.description:
The T-INH, Transfer - Independent Neurological Habitat helmets, so-called "Taurus" for the winged protrusions from both sides of the helmet, are a medical and scientific breakthrough for military application. An engram of the patient's mind-- such as a soldier who's physical form is beyond saving --can be slotted into the device, giving them a new lease on life. A full return to function can be accomplished in as little as two weeks of vigorous mental rehabilitation and exercises, and operators on average return to field duties within six weeks.

Browse the full set: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=FLAK2&Category=1&CreatorName=FirstSight+UGC&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3
